ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market dataset */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of asset (e.g., stocks, bonds, commodities) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the dataset */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the prices */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_asset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the exchange */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend (e.g., bull, bear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time feed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange providing the feed */,
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset type being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Current market price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the real-time feed */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous feed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_feeds_asset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset being monitored */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition triggering the alert (e.g., price above/below threshold) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market dataset being reported on */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., news agency, social media) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis record */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentiment analysis (e.g., AI, human) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score for the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES market_news ("news_id")
)
